race.comment: SNOW GOD (3) missed by 1L last start over 1200m and looks ready for the step up to 1400m today. Drops in weight as this is a tougher race, but his recent figures suggest he's not out of this. Can get back to winning ways today in what looks a winnable race. MISSISSIPPI DAWN (11) will be fitter for a recent trial coming into this and continues to improve with racing. Short of her best trip here, but draws the inside and can make an impression with no weight on her back. STYLISH LORD (1) bumped into a smart one over this course and distance last time out and has the speed to roll across from a wide draw. Cooper remains in the saddle with her 2kg claim coming in handy. Can be tough to run down. THINK PINK DAZE (12) was too good in a CL3 last start and looks a very progressive type. Drawn wide, but watch for her flying late. IMPRESSIVE JEWEL (7) is better than she showed before the break and can bounce back on resumption.
